title: デビュー戦の後に・我慢坂のはじまり

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black manages to run the entirety of her
debut race, but her face shows no signs of joy
even after she crosses the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all her excitement, the terror of actually
running a real race caught up with her, and all she
could do was run like mad during it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's made painfully aware of how sloppy her
running was today, and how such a performance
will never reach anyone's heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, she'll need to build up experience with
races suitable to her level to prepare for the
Triple Crown next year.
